title: pteris inaequalis
intro: Pteris inaequalis, also known as the unequal brake fern, is a species of fern native to Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Pteris inaequalis include reducing fever, relieving coughs and colds, and aiding in digestion. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
